Concept 1: The Garden (Dark, Organic)

The Garden

Ferni grows because people care.

No investors. No growth targets. Just a community tending to something alive.

Seeds, Not Subscriptions

You're not paying for a service. You're nurturing something that helps everyone bloom.

No Paywalls. Ever.

When you need support most, money should never be the barrier. The garden keeps Ferni free.

Gardeners, Not Customers

Everyone tends the garden. Some with seeds. Some by showing up. Both matter equally.

"When enough people give a little, everyone gets a lot."

Plant a Seed
Concept 2: The Manifesto (Bold, Editorial)

We chose people over profit.

Most AI companies optimize for growth. We asked: what if we optimized for connection?

01

Seeds, Not Subscriptions

Contributions are called "seeds" because you're not buying access—you're helping something grow. Every seed plants possibility for someone who can't afford to give.

02

No Paywalls. Ever.

The moment someone needs support most shouldn't be the moment we ask for money. Ferni will always be free when you need it.

03

Gardeners, Not Customers

Contributors are gardeners. Free users are gardeners too—they tend the garden by showing up. Both are essential.

When enough people give a little, everyone gets a lot.

Plant a Seed
Concept 3: The Community (Warm, Animated)

How Ferni stays free for everyone.

No venture capital. No growth-at-all-costs. Just people who believe everyone deserves support—contributing what they can.

Seeds, Not Subscriptions

You're nurturing a community, not paying for a product.

No Paywalls. Ever.

Support should never be locked behind a credit card.

Gardeners, Not Customers

Everyone who shows up tends the garden. Everyone matters.

The Garden

When enough people give a little, everyone gets a lot.

Plant a Seed
Concept 4: The Story (Immersive, Animated)

Community-Funded

What if AI prioritized people over profit?

Most AI companies have investors demanding growth. Ferni has a community planting seeds. When people who can afford to give a little do, everyone benefits.

Seeds, Not Subscriptions

Contributions nurture a community. You're not buying a service—you're helping something grow.

No Paywalls. Ever.

When you need support most, money should never stand in the way. The garden keeps Ferni free.

Gardeners, Not Customers

Contributors tend the garden. Free users do too—by showing up. Both are essential.

"When enough people give a little, everyone gets a lot."

Plant a Seed
